name: Chili Cheese Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Melt butter in a 9-inch square pan and place in the oven.
3. Tip the pan to coat the bottom with melted butter.
4. In a large bowl, beat eggs.
5. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Add melted butter; set the pan aside.
7. Stir in chilies, cottage cheese, and shredded Monterey Jack.
8. Blend well until combined.
9. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
11. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 30-35 minutes or until lightly browned.
12. Cool slightly and cut into small squares.
13. May be frozen; flash freeze before freezing.
14. To thaw, place on a baking sheet and allow to thaw at room temperature for 1-2 hours.
15. Before serving, reheat in a preheated oven at 400°F for 10 minutes or until hot.
Note: The recipe may be doubled and baked in a 13"x9-inch baking dish.
